title: calappa sancona
intro: Calappa sancona, also known as the Calappa tree or Calappa sancona plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to tropical Asia. The Calappa sancona plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions, such as acne and eczema. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the leaves or roots in water, and is also used in herbal preparations like capsules, tinctures, and salves.
